text: If UFOs are all just some fake, multi-decade-long hazing ritual, then nobody should have any issue

transcript_title: The Wall Street Journal Is Lying About U
text: with the impending UAP Disclosure Act.

transcript_title: The Wall Street Journal Is Lying About U
text: Who cares if we have civilian oversight over programs that don't exist?

transcript_title: The Wall Street Journal Is Lying About U
text: And hopefully when the UAP Disclosure Act goes up for vote again,

transcript_title: The Wall Street Journal Is Lying About U
text: Sean Kirkpatrick won't lobby against it like he did last time.

transcript_title: The Wall Street Journal Is Lying About U
text: So on that note, I'm linking a petition below that you will hopefully all sign in support

transcript_title: The Wall Street Journal Is Lying About U
text: of the UAP Disclosure Act.

transcript_title: The Wall Street Journal Is Lying About U
text: This will ensure civilian congressional oversight over UFOs

transcript_title: The Wall Street Journal Is Lying About U
text: and elect an elite presidential board to help push disclosure.

transcript_title: The Wall Street Journal Is Lying About U
text: This Wall Street Journal article is truly so bad

transcript_title: The Wall Street Journal Is Lying About U
text: that I am almost inclined to believe it is a pro-UFO conspiracy.

transcript_title: The Wall Street Journal Is Lying About U
text: So please, Wall Street Journal, do better next time.

transcript_title: The Wall Street Journal Is Lying About U
text: We need better debunkers.

transcript_title: The Wall Street Journal Is Lying About U
text: I'm not anti-debunking.

transcript_title: The Wall Street Journal Is Lying About U
text: There's plenty of bullshit in UFO World, a lot of which I cover.

transcript_title: The Wall Street Journal Is Lying About U
text: I'm just anti-bad, lazy debunking.

transcript_title: The Wall Street Journal Is Lying About U
text: And if Joel Schechtman or Sean Kirkpatrick or Susan Goff or any of these people want to come

transcript_title: The Wall Street Journal Is Lying About U
text: on my show or debate me in any context and discuss any of this in a civil way,

transcript_title: The Wall Street Journal Is Lying About U
text: I'd be happy to host them.

transcript_title: The Wall Street Journal Is Lying About U
text: Surely it would help promote this article.

transcript_title: The Wall Street Journal Is Lying About U
text: And if the article's contents are true, they can back all this stuff up.

transcript_title: The Wall Street Journal Is Lying About U
text: I suspect I won't hear back about that invitation.

transcript_title: The Wall Street Journal Is Lying About U
text: And that's probably the most frustrating thing about these people.

transcript_title: The Wall Street Journal Is Lying About U
text: They only hit you with these cheap shots from afar.

transcript_title: The Wall Street Journal Is Lying About U
text: They never actually show up and meet you face to face.

transcript_title: The Wall Street Journal Is Lying About U
text: So again, open invite.

transcript_title: The Wall Street Journal Is Lying About U
text: I've also messaged Lena Bell expressing a desire to write an op-ed rebuttal in the Wall Street Journal.

transcript_title: The Wall Street Journal Is Lying About U
text: If she says yes, I'll let Robert Hastings, Carl Nell, David Grush, Merrick von Rennenkamp,

transcript_title: The Wall Street Journal Is Lying About U
text: Michael Schellenberger, and anyone else contribute and co-author this paper with me.

transcript_title: The Wall Street Journal Is Lying About U
text: Because surely the Wall Street Journal wants that in the name of having an open and honest Socratic debate.

transcript_title: The Wall Street Journal Is Lying About U
text: Until next time, for hopefully a more aspirational and positive episode,

transcript_title: The Wall Street Journal Is Lying About U
text: I'm Jesse Michaels, and this is American Alchemy.
